# Real Engineer for Codex

Repository: https://github.com/ArcQian-bit/codex-real-engineer-skills
Install: https://arcqian-bit.github.io/codex-real-engineer-skills/install-codex-real-engineer-skill.html

Real Engineer for Codex is one Codex skill that routes software engineering
requests into diagnose, TDD, grill, prototype, and architecture modes. It is
designed to prevent AI coding agents from guessing before reproducing,
implementing before clarifying, or refactoring before understanding module
boundaries.
